page_metadata.biotools__summary: ExoDIVERISTY is a tool that can be used to resolve diverse protein-DNA footprints from exonuclease based ChIP experiments such as ChIP-exo or ChIP-nexus.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ExoDIVERISTY is a tool that can be used to resolve diverse protein-DNA footprints from exonuclease based ChIP experiments such as ChIP-exo or ChIP-nexus.
